name: Insurance Claim
description: File insurance claims, retrieve policy details, and track claim status
promptSummary: File insurance claims and manage policy information.
promptBody:
## Insurance Claim Procedure

### Step 1: Retrieve policy information
- Use read_user_profile(insurance) to get the user's policy details
- Note policy number, coverage type, and deductible

### Step 2: Gather incident details
- Location: use get_current_location
- Time of incident
- Description of what happened
- Other parties involved (names, license plates, insurance info)
- Police report number if available

### Step 3: Document evidence
- Remind user to use open_camera for photos of damage
- List required documentation: photos, police report, witness info

### Step 4: File the claim
- Use call_service(geico, fileClaim) with all gathered information
- Confirm claim number with user
- Note expected timeline and next steps

### Step 5: Follow up
- Summarize claim details for user's records
- Provide claim number and contact information for follow-up
- Note deductible amount and coverage details
